summary: Completed comprehensive testing of BARBER HUB MVP - both backend APIs and frontend functionality working correctly
passed_tests: Backend API root endpoint (/api/) returns welcome message
Backend API /api/barbers returns empty array (expected for initial setup)
Admin login with credentials (phone: admin, password: admin123) works correctly
User registration with phone number works
Gender selection page loads with perfect 50/50 split (men/women)
Navigation to home page after selecting gender works
Both men's and women's themes apply correctly
Authentication page loads with login/register tabs
Navigation elements are present and functional
